'''Choral''' was a [[Stormtrooper/Legends|stormtrooper]] of [[Unit Aurek-Four]] of the [[Aurek Company]] in the [[501st Legion/Legends|501st Legion]] of the [[Empire of the Hand]].

Choral participated in [[Capture of the Warlord|the final assault against]] "[[the Warlord]]" on [[Kariek]]. He commented that the fortress of the Warlord "looks like something out of a bad legend".

==Appearances==
*''[[Fool's Bargain]]'' {{1st}}
